titleStmt.title: SII 39.121: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 121. (A.R. No. 121 of 1916.) ETTIYĀTTALI, ARANTANGI TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT. AGASTYĒŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL •••••••••• ŚAKA 1364 (1442 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription registers the gift of the Kāṇiyātchi right over certain lands located in the village of Maṅguḍi in Ilaṅgōnāḍu, a sub-division of Vaḍaveḷḷāru alias Sundarapāṇḍya vaḷanāḍu to Nayiṉār Ilakkappadaṇṇāyaka-Tonḍaimāṉār, the son of Aḻagiyamaṇavāḷapperumāḷ-Toṇḍaimāṉār. The taxes were to be paid to the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
satyam cakāttam 1000 3 100 6 10 4 mel cellāniṉṟa tuntumi varuṣam Aṟpaci mātam 2 10 Aṟantāṅki
Aracu Uṭaiyār Aḻakiya maṇavāḷap perumāḷ toṇṭaimāṉār nayiṉār Ilakkappa daṇṇāyakat toṇṭaimāṉāṟku pūkātta
kuṭiṉāṭṭāril Ēḻumper taṉpiḷḷaiyār Uḷḷiṭṭār pakkal vaṭaveḷḷāṟāṉa cuntarapāṇṭiya vaḷaṉāṭṭu yiḷaṅko nāṭṭu
māṅkuṭi vayalil Avaṉ pakkal koṇṭa nilam tevaṉ vayakkal rūpāy nirpokiṟa tevaṉ vayakkal rūpāy Āka nilam 100 2 10vum yiṟai
yiliyāka kaḻittu yitukku veṭṭimuṭṭi viṉiyokam mākkalam yivai kaḻittu nayiṉār tiruvakatticuramuṭaiyāṟku māttāl
Añcu marakkāl poṉ kuṭukka kaṟpitta Aḷavukku yiṉṉilam daṇṇāyakkat toṇṭaimāṉār cantirātittavarai kāṇiāṭciyāka
paṟṟi Āḷakaṭavarākavum yitukku Akitam paṇṇiṉavaṉ gaṅkaikaraiyil brahmaṇaraiyum kapilaiyaiyum koṉṟa paāvam
peṟa kaṭavārākavum yippaṭikku Uṭaiyavar Aruḷicceyapaṭikku nirampavaḻakiyāṉ kāliṅkarāyaṉ Eḻuttu va koṭṭai
tiruvakatti Uṭaiyāṉ pakka māṅkuṭi vayalil koṇṭu colai Uruvam Aḷavu
Digital edition of SII 39.121 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
